selection_explanation.summary_zh: 先找到社区服务入口，再用一场公开活动建立第一条邻里联系。
selection_explanation.summary_en: Start with a community service entry point, then build a first neighborhood connection at a public activity.

reasons.text_zh: 你最关心社区服务，因此路线优先帮助你找到可继续咨询的线下入口。
reasons.text_en: Community service is your priority, so the route starts with an in-person source of ongoing guidance.

reasons.text_zh: 你刚到第一周，反馈会把可立即执行和可继续咨询放在前面。
reasons.text_en: Because this is your first week, the plan prioritizes immediate actions and places to ask follow-up questions.

reasons.text_zh: 你独自参与，建议先从有工作人员或志愿者的场景开始。
reasons.text_en: You are joining alone, so start in a setting with staff or volunteers present.

reasons.text_zh: 你未选择额外支持需求；路线使用标准参与提示，仍可按实际情况调整。
reasons.text_en: You selected no additional support need, so the route uses standard guidance and can still be adjusted as needed.

items.summary_zh: 社区服务点是了解在地政务、便民指引和居民服务的首选入口。
items.summary_en: Community service points are a practical first stop for local guidance.
items.tips_zh: 先询问可提供的语言支持和最适合新居民的服务窗口。出发前按天气、时间和个人状态做最后确认。
items.tips_en: Ask which language support and newcomer services are currently available. Make a final check based on weather, timing, and how you feel.

items.summary_zh: 公开社区活动提供一个有明确主题的邻里交流场景。
items.summary_en: A public community activity offers a neighborhood interaction with a clear shared topic.
items.tips_zh: 提前到场了解流程；演示确认不创建真实报名、预约或票券。提前设定停留时间，感觉合适再延长。
items.tips_en: Arrive early to understand the format; Demo Confirm creates no booking, reservation, or ticket. Set a planned stay and extend it only if the setting feels right.

event.summary_zh: 面向桐梓林新老居民的轻社交活动。
event.summary_en: A casual meet-up for old and new Tongzilin neighbors.
